horoscope: Today's energies are pleasing for taking an inventory of your responsibilities, dear Aries. While you continue to keep some plans to yourself, and this is a good strategy, you include others more readily rather than alienating them today. You are coming across almost mildly these days with Mars in the sign behind yours, but a lot is happening beneath the surface of things. Venus in your sign connects with Mars today, which is buried in your privacy sector where no one can see, and your calm exterior doesn’t always tell the whole story. You’re sociable and friendly, but keeping a lot more than usual to yourself. Still, especially as the day advances, you feel you’re on the right road. Ambition builds pleasantly.

The Moon moves in harmony with your sign today, dear Taurus, encouraging a more natural mood and expression. You're connecting with your need for happiness, whether this is about a cause, a relationship, or a personal interest. Still, few people are seeing your softer side or learning about your true feelings on matters, as Venus currently transits your privacy sector. At times, this can lead to a few misunderstandings, since much of what you say and do doesn’t necessarily represent how you feel. You can appear more carefree than you are. However, being aware of this tendency is helpful. When you’re expressing something especially important to you, for example, you may have a better time getting your point across if you consciously engage your feelings and warmer, softer side and make it part of the whole package. Later today finds you more conversational. Positive body language can help you get your message across well.

Ups and downs are possible today if you're not quite sure whether you want more or less closeness with someone, dear Gemini. Try to focus on the areas of your life that are working for you, and your feelings will more naturally sort out. Today’s transits emphasize your differing goals and interests. With friends these days, you’re seeking harmony and peace, but in your professional life, you’re a different person right now! You’re unafraid to make some waves if it gets you closer to your goals. It’s not always easy to integrate your ambitions with your social life, but it’s achievable. Right now, it may be best to compartmentalize. As the day advances, you're engaged, interested, and feeling very hopeful about the future.

The Moon heads into your partnership sector today, dear Cancer, and you're particularly committed to making your relationships work. Early today, you should watch for a small tendency to want to control outcomes or to respond to your fears rather than simply enjoy your feelings of happiness about someone. Awareness of rebellious feelings will help you to overcome them. While part of you is fully enjoying your duties and responsibilities, another part doesn’t want to be tied down, as Mars moves through your adventure sector, encouraging your spontaneous side. Ideally today, you can swing both. The practical side of your relationships is in the spotlight. Relationships, studies, and conversations can feel good as the day advances.

Early today, you could feel somewhat blocked or conflicted, dear Leo. Aim to simplify so that you can feel more productive. You’re inclined to express your affections straightforwardly these days, but you’re a little more protective or contemplative regarding your desires, frustrations, and plans. This duality can sometimes work against you, leading to minor misunderstandings, and this tendency is more prominent today than usual. However, knowing that you may be giving off mixed signals can help you fill in the blanks when needed. As well, the day advances far more confidently, and you're likely to enjoy a beautiful balance between dynamism and structure. You can accomplish a lot with the right attitude. Your mind and heart are engaged.

You crave equality these days, and you’re ready to fight for it if you have to, dear Virgo, but another part of you is more concerned with how deep a connection is than the surface dynamics of your relationships. Today's events can remind you of this difference. The playful side of your nature wants some time in the light today, as the Moon heads into your sector of joy and entertainment. You're dealing with others with much warmth, and this earns you extra brownie points. Self-improvement efforts can be an active focus as the day advances.

You seek comforting and familiar activities today, and you crave feelings of security and rootedness, dear Libra, with the Moon's move into your solar fourth house. Some form of emotional retreat is appropriate now. Even with some bumps or obstacles early today, you might discover creative ways to interact. You’re more concerned with keeping the peace and promoting harmony in your personal life and close relationships these days, but you’re on fire when it comes to getting practical things done and are not afraid to make some ripples if it means you get things done. It can be difficult to integrate these two drives today, which can lead to some misunderstandings, but as the day advances, communication improves. While you can focus too intently on the physical or practical side of a problem early today, a more holistic approach would serve you better, and this comes far more naturally later today.

Transits early today make you more aware than usual of your responsibilities, dear Scorpio. However, you loosen up as the day advances, but you approach life with a desire to either settle in and get comfortable or work on building something rather than innovating or starting anew. You’re especially interested in keeping things harmonious and peaceful in your daily affairs, but your personal life is often a different story these days. In fact, you’re unafraid of fireworks with friends if this means living authentically and tackling the deeper problems or getting things out in the open. You’re making these different needs and approaches work today. The Moon's move into your communications sector today inspires connecting. You can be a good arbitrator now, as you see many sides of a story. Confidence in your relationships and projects builds.

You’re intent on promoting peace and harmony with others these days, dear Sagittarius, but your home life may be a little more fraught or tense as you feel driven to make improvements and changes. As such, you can seem quite different to different people in your life these days! It isn’t about being inauthentic--it’s about having different goals and approaches in the various areas of your life. The Moon leaves your sign and enters your solar second house today, and you get into a practical mindset. You're well-positioned to assess your finances and working position, even if your feelings are a little strong on these matters. Later today, you might enjoy an enlightening conversation with family or a loved one.

You are quick to disagree if it means getting to the truth or expressing your opinion these days, dear Capricorn, with Mars in your communications sector. However, you're very focused on creating harmony in your personal life. In fact, you’ll go to great lengths to make peace with family or to create a beautiful, easygoing environment at home. This difference is prominent today. The Moon heads into your sign today, and you might discover creative ways to meet your needs without putting pressure on yourself. There can be some tension or resistance to manage before you come into your own today, but you're willing to take the lead, especially if it helps someone out. You're in a position to better understand what's been going on inside of you.

Communicating kindly and effectively comes naturally to you these days, dear Aquarius, even with Mercury retrograde. Still, you're not afraid to stir up controversy if you feel less than respected. In fact, you’re quicker than usual to defend your choices. Early today, you can feel blocked or tied down, and it’s best to take extra time for creative or imaginative pursuits that help you heal. With enthusiasm waning, it might appear as if you need to put more effort into chores and tasks that you'd rather not take on. However, do your best not to over-identify with what seem to be slowdowns, failures, and errors. These have little to do with you personally and more to do with life itself, which is currently demanding that you pay closer attention to detail. Otherwise, the day is strong for reconnecting with your inner self. The Moon heads into your solar twelfth house, signaling the need for more privacy, rest, or downtime to detox on an emotional level.

The Moon heads into your social sector today, dear Pisces, for a stay of just over two days. There can be some difficulty knowing whether you want to be close to someone, or if you require a little space early today. While your focus is likely to be rather sociable today, you're increasingly interested in your practical affairs, and you may very well find it enjoyable to get them in order. You’re more often asserting your desires these days, with Mars in your sign, but you’re not always upfront with others regarding your affections, which can lead to a disconnect that’s a little more pronounced today. Watch for a manner that makes others think you’re more independent or indifferent than you truly are, as this can lead to a feeling that others are ignoring or insensitive to your needs. Fortunately, you have excellent energies that help you embrace activities rather than overthink things. It's a good time for strengthening ties with friends and groups, or for working cooperatively towards common goals.
